# host: # host: "www" (default) or "apex" (sends Host: ag-grid.com). For 410/200, location is empty.
# Assertions are on the SINGLE response (status + Location) so we never follow a redirect to
# production (CloudFront would 403). A single response whose Location is the final target proves
# the redirect is a single hop.
# --- SE-60 (grid; the /charts/* ones are asserted in the charts section) ---
# --- SE-64 single-hop (www): Location must already be the FINAL page (one hop) ---
# --- SE-66 apex single-hop (Host: ag-grid.com): one hop straight to the final www URL ---
# --- SE-61 / SE-60 charts (served by the charts subdir .htaccess) ---
# Archive: versioned archive docs are live content (the blanket 410 was removed), so a versioned
# path serves; only the bare archive index redirects, to /documentation-archive. Privacy redirects
# to the apex policy page (301) — it is not gone.
# --- Regression: pre-existing redirects must still work unchanged ---
# --- No-shadow negatives: real live pages must NOT be redirected (expect 200) ---
